subject: (no subject)
body: I am looking forward to seeing you on Friday.. PLease bring the images of the main house , images for the guest area, I have asked for three months ago. I hope you will bring a complete shcedule, naster plan, and nursery layout as previously promised. THe look of the pool house, and the spa details that I have also requested in May. WE have forgotten about he house for the dock, and I hope to see a security pavillion layout, and how it attaches to the wall of the shed. A landscape plan is also way overdue, with repsect to the office that is about to start construction.
